response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of strong software engineering across distributed systems, high-throughput data pipelines, and TypeScript/Node.js — all relevant foundations. However, the role requires 8+ years of AI-driven solution development, and his explicitly AI-focused work is limited to the current position started in April 2025, which references MCP code generators and agentic workflow support but lacks depth on LLMs, RAG, or vector databases. Python is absent from his skill set, and there is no demonstrated experience with enterprise-facing technical leadership in the AI/GenAI space.
strengths: Current role at re:cinq directly involves Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and agentic workflow infrastructure, aligning with key job technologies
Extensive production experience with high-volume data pipelines and distributed systems (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/second) provides a strong engineering substrate
Staff-level title held at multiple companies with evidence of mentoring, DevOps ownership, and cross-domain technical leadership
concerns: AI-specific work is effectively limited to the current role (April 2025–present), far short of the required 8+ years developing AI-driven production solutions
Python is absent from the listed skills and work history, despite being a primary required language for this role
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), or enterprise customer-facing GenAI delivery

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and RAG/vector DB skills
